title: Global Gizmos Magical Bubble Lamps / 2 Styles/Ideal for Desks/Relaxing Bubbles / 7 Changing Light Colours/Atmospheric Mood Light/Scuba Diver Decoration
features: MAGICAL BUBBLE LAMP – This rose gold, 32cm colour changing bubble lamp with a scuba diver and fish is a fantastic novelty mood light that creates an amazing sensory experience for any room in your house, school, or workplace.

RELAXING BUBBLES – The lamp works by sending a variable steady stream of bubbles up the tube which in turn creates oscillation, so you can enjoy watching the included unicorns and rainbows moving inside the lamp.

COLOUR CHANGING – This mesmerising lamp contains 12 bright LED lights to add a touch of relaxation, light, and style to any room. Chill out and watch as the mood lighting seamlessly changes through 7 different colours.

SCUBA DIVER LAMP - The LED bubble lamp contains a mix of fish along with a scuba diver figure, which combined with the light show and soothing hum of the bubble motor, will create a unique feature in any room.

GLOBAL GIZMOS – Global Gizmos is the leading manufacturer of a wide range of boardgames, arcade games, tabletop games and many other great products, all of which can be viewed at the Global Gizmos Amazon page.
description: Product Description Global Gizmos Scuba Diver Bubble Lamp Relaxing Mood Lighting Lamp Help yourself to relax with this calming, beautiful bubble lamp from Global Gizmos! It features a scene of a scuba diver swimming among fish accompanied by a steady stream of bubbles that keeps the figures inside moving around. The lamp contains a total of 12 LEDs to illuminate your room in a warming, relaxing manner that brings a sense of class and style to its surroundings. Its base is metallic blue, blending in perfectly with the liquid inside. Not only is the lamp great for creating a relaxing vibe, it also works very well as a sensory experience, providing calm with its colours and the soothing hum of its motor. KEY FEATURES: 12 LED Lights 7 Different Light Colours Scuba Diver & Fish Props 32cm Height Relaxing Motor Sound PERFECT FOR DESKS Measuring 32cm high by 10.5cm wide, the lamp can easily fit on a desk, table, bedside cabinet, or any location that you need some relaxation in. SATISFYING DECORATIONS The decorations inside the lamp include a scuba diver figure, several colourful fish, and a sea shark. All of the decorations move around seamlessly thanks to the bubbles. COLOUR CHANGING LEDS Great for providing mood lighting, the lamp's LEDs can switch between 7 different colours over time, resulting in a calm colour changing effect.
